ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "growth_stage" TEXT /* Current growth stage of the company (e.g., seed stage, mature stage) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "sub_industry" TEXT /* Specific sub-industry of the company */,
  "client_focus" TEXT /* Focus area of the clients served by the company */,
  "business_model" TEXT /* Business model type (e.g., B2B, B2C) */,
  "company_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the company (e.g., operational, acquired) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the company */,
  "founders" TEXT /* Names of the company's founders */,
  "mission_statement" TEXT /* Company's mission or vision statement */,
  "last_funding_round" TEXT /* Type of the last funding round the company went through */,
  "last_funding_date" TEXT /* Date of the last funding round */,
  "last_valuation_usd" REAL /* Last recorded valuation of the company in USD */,
  "last_valuation_date" TEXT /* Date when the last valuation was recorded */,
  "investor_count" INTEGER /* Number of unique investors the company has had */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding round */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company receiving the funding */,
  "round_type" TEXT /* Type of funding round (e.g., ACQUISITION, LATE VC) */,
  "amount_raised" REAL /* Amount of money raised in this funding round */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the amount raised */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the funding round */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year when the funding round took place */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the funding round */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the funding round */,
  "pre_money_valuation" REAL /* Pre-money valuation of the company before the funding round */,
  "post_money_valuation" REAL /* Post-money valuation of the company after the funding round */,
  "lead_investor" TEXT /* Name of the lead investor in the funding round */,
  "round_focus" TEXT /* Specific focus or purpose of the funding round */,
  "is_series" INTEGER /* Indicates if the funding round is part of a series */,
  "series_number" INTEGER /* Number of the series if the funding round is part of a series */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Status of the funding round */,
  "funding_round_url" TEXT /* URL to a detailed report or press release about the funding round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_rounds_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "investor_name" TEXT /* Name of the investor or investment firm */,
  "investor_type" TEXT /* Type of investor (e.g., corporate, venture capital, angel investor) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the investor is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the investor is based */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the investor is based */,
  "investment_focus" TEXT /* Specific industries or sectors the investor focuses on */,
  "investment_stage" TEXT /* Stages of growth the investor typically invests in */,
  "investor_url" TEXT /* URL to the investor's website or profile */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the investor */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the investor (if a firm) was founded */,
  "total_investments" INTEGER /* Total number of investments made by the investor */,
  "total_investment_amount" REAL /* Total amount of money invested by the investor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "valuations" (
  "valuation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each valuation record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company being valued */,
  "valuation_usd" REAL /* Valuation of the company in USD */,
  "valuation_date" TEXT /* Date when the valuation was recorded */,
  "pre_money_valuation" REAL /* Pre-money valuation of the company before the valuation date */,
  "post_money_valuation" REAL /* Post-money valuation of the company after the valuation date */,
  "valuation_source" TEXT /* Source of the valuation data */,
  "valuation_status" TEXT /* Status of the valuation */,
  "valuation_url" TEXT /* URL to a detailed report or press release about the valuation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("valuation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_valuations_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment relationship */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding round */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investor involved in the funding round */,
  "investment_role" TEXT /* Role of the investor in the funding round */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Amount invested by the investor in the funding round */,
  "investment_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the investment amount */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment was made */,
  "investment_status" TEXT /* Status of the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_relationships_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_relationships_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES funding_rounds ("round_id")
)
